name: Honey Scepter
description: Notes The Honey Scepter hits more targets than any other scepter, but doesn’t do as much damage as a tiered scepter would. This can be useful for newer players who tend to encounter plentiful amounts of weaker enemies, but it usually isn’t too useful in endgame content against single-target bosses or enemies that boast high defense and are able to mostly ignore the damage it deals.
